texto: Are you unhappy? Ok. Being unhappy is a part of life
autor: no big deal! Continue your life because neither unhappiness nor happiness drop anchor in your life!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de no big deal! Continue your life because neither unhappiness nor happiness drop anchor in your life! que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Are you unhappy? Ok. Being unhappy is a part of life”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, mehmet-murat-ildan, unhappy, com foco em reflexao.
